subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The Wronged One of the world summoneth all nations, at all times and in every season, unto truth, and His purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله مظلوم عالم جمیع امم را در کل اوان و احیان بحق دعوت مینماید و مقصود از
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @goodly deeds; actions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @contention and conflict, @being a source of light; guidance, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
